title: The Truth of the Void Century Spreads
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Dorry, Unknown person #13, Vegapunk, Kizaru as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Huh? Who the heck is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: There's only one more minute, Vegapunk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems fortune did not favor you this time, vegapunk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: [Front Cover and Color Spread Next Issue]
